text: 没有家庭啊不顾家庭的 不顾老人的 不管不顾的 做不到啊
traditional_chinese: 沒有家庭或不顧家庭、不顧老人的，無法做到。
English: It's not possible without a family, without taking care of the family, without taking care of the elderly, without being responsible.
Vietnamese: Những người già neo đơn không có gia đình chăm sóc
French: des personnes âgées sans famille, pesonne leur prendre soin
